name: transformBy
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } }).transformBy(function(s) { return { total: s.count * 2 }; }).outputState()

name: filterBy includes
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } }).filterBy(function(s) { return s.count > 0; }).outputState()

name: filterBy excludes
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return { count: 0 }; }, Ping: function(s, e) { s.count++; return s; } }).filterBy(function(s) { return s.count > 5; }).outputState()

name: outputState sets result stream
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } }).outputState()

name: transformBy sets state transform flag
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } }).transformBy(function(s) { return s; }).outputState()
